case_title: DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ ZUNIGA VS. CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND NEW VENICE PIZZA & RESTAURANT,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZUNIGA, DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND NEW VENICE PIZZA & RESTAURANT, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUNIGA, DIONISIO RODRIGUEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA AND NEW VENICE PIZZA & RESTAURANT, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $24,799.33 PRINCIPAL, $492.49 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,661.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
